calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar May-25-2023 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved Of Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Defendant's Yiming Chen and Yantao Ruan. Defendant's are assisted by Court Certified Cantonese Interpreter Rebecca Chau.

Discussed. The defendants did not give notice that they would appear to contest the tentative ruling. They are not allowed to argue the motion.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel is GRANTED. Counsel to prepare an order. Dismissal filed on May 24, 2023. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2023 Set For Trial On Jul-03-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
